metadata.short_desc: Dispatch tasks to other AstrBot instances as sub-agents.
metadata.desc: Forward messages and tasks to one or more sub-AstrBot instances via the AstrBot OpenAPI and collect their results. Supports sync call, background tasks, broadcast, project session multi-turn dialog (plugin stores no history; sub-AstrBot accumulates it), LLM Tool, WebUI instance management and task list.

default_timeout.hint: Shared by sync and async calls. Increase to 300~1800s for long-running tasks.

max_concurrent.hint: Broadcast (/subagent_broadcast) is rate-limited by this semaphore. Default 5.

verify_ssl.description: [SSL] Verify TLS certificates for sub-AstrBot instances (global default)
verify_ssl.hint: Enabled by default. Disable only for self-signed certificates — Bearer Token will be sent in plaintext.

session_lock_timeout.description: [Project session] Lock-wait timeout for same (subagent, project) calls (seconds)
session_lock_timeout.hint: Default 30s. Same-key calls queue; error if wait exceeds this. Still active to avoid session_id write races.

subagents.description: [Initial sub-AstrBot] List seeded to DB on first start
subagents.hint: Seeded only when the SQLite subagent_instances table is empty. Subsequent edits go through the WebUI instance management page.

username.description: [User] What shows in the sub-AstrBot WebUI chat stream sender column
username.hint: Filled = always shown as that value. Empty = fall back to the master sender (backward compatible).

access_control.hint: Controls which users can invoke this plugin (commands + LLM Tool).

allowed_user_ids.hint: Required when whitelist is enabled. Get a user ID by sending a message to AstrBot and reading sender_id from the log.

subagent-page.title: Sub-AstrBot
subagent-page.description: Single page with internal tabs: Instance Manager (CRUD + ping + SSL) + Task List (running / history + cancel / delete) + Project Sessions (v1.2+ plan B: only (subagent, project) → sub-AstrBot session_id mapping; history lives in sub-AstrBot).
subagent-page.heading: Sub-AstrBot
